REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1359-1361 Filbert Street, San Francisco, Ca 94109)
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Seth Scootsky appeared in person for and with Barabra Simon on zoom.
Michael Bellings (Belling's Brothers) realtor for buyers in person for and with Samuel Miechman and Julin Gurer.
Rene Perez (Arribba Inc.) realtor for buyers in person for and with Qui Bing and Binyuan Chen.

The sale was confirmed at $1,975,500.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed (November 15, 2023). The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property. Order under submission with the intent to grant. An additional bond is required. The amount of said bond is to be calculated by counsel.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: SIngh. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-20-2023 Continued To Dec-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-18-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Dec-16-2009 is admitted to probate. Barbara R. Simon is appointed Executor of the estate with limited authority. Bond is set at $170,000. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Se-18-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed ten days prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Continued To Aug-03-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
